ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the survey (e.g., Alcohol use, Allergies) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the survey */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the survey */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who created the survey */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who last updated the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who submitted the response */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the response (e.g., None, Quite a lot, Not much, Not at all) */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the response (for open-ended questions) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of responses in this category */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of responses in this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses_to_multiple_choice" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the response belongs to */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the selected option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_to_multiple_choice_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_to_multiple_choice_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES question_options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the option belongs to */,
  "option_text" TEXT /* Text of the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_options_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the log entry belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant who triggered the log entry */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., survey started, question submitted) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_logs_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
